brief: Escalating Middle East tensions as Iran and Houthis attack shipping, prompting US strikes; UK's new PM considers wealth tax; research explores AI's impact on writing and communication.
news_summary: Iran and Houthis attack ships in Strait of Hormuz and Red Sea, US launches retaliatory strikes; UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham is urged to introduce a wealth tax on the super-rich.
papers_summary: TechComm papers examine the effects of ChatGPT on writing, developmental pathways of noun phrase complexity in L2 writing, and the role of pauses in writing processes.

en.brief: Escalating Middle East tensions as Iran and Houthis attack shipping, prompting US strikes; UK's new PM considers wealth tax; research explores AI's impact on writing and communication.
en.news_summary: Iran and Houthis attack ships in Strait of Hormuz and Red Sea, US launches retaliatory strikes; UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham is urged to introduce a wealth tax on the super-rich.
en.papers_summary: TechComm papers examine the effects of ChatGPT on writing, developmental pathways of noun phrase complexity in L2 writing, and the role of pauses in writing processes.

zh.brief: 歐盟對阿里速賣通罰款5.5億歐元，阿根廷推出太陽能觀光火車，英國新首相貝安德上任，西班牙奪得世界盃冠軍，中國外賣騎手獲文學獎。研究方面多聚焦於語言教學與寫作過程。
zh.news_summary: 歐盟因速賣通售賣非法商品罰款5.5億歐元；阿根廷推出零排放太陽能火車；英國貝安德就任首相；西班牙世界盃奪冠；中國藍領作家王計兵獲文學獎。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇研究探討語言寫作中的名詞短語複雜性、ChatGPT的修辭影響、以及學術網絡中的流動性與不穩定性。

todays_image.caption: The AI detection tool’s verdict on Pope Leo’s speeches being human-authored is as naturally organic as the seaweed Lobophora sp. growing in the ocean.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
